Active Filters:
Out on Duty Request
Create an outstation attendance entry for field work or off-site visits
OOD entries bypass the standard Sign In / Sign Out flow. They require approval from your reporting manager before the dates are marked as present.
Apply Leave
Submit a leave request for planned time-off, sickness, or personal needs
Leave requests need approval from your reporting manager. Paid leaves deduct from your annual balance; unpaid leaves are recorded but don't deduct.
